_meta.description: Seed of past SIU investigation outcomes so the Fraud Agent has precedents on the first demo run (v3 feedback loop). Hand-crafted, NOT real cases.

outcomes.officer_reason: FL PIP pattern with flagged tow company (QuickTow LLC) confirmed as staged crash by SIU; recovery initiated
Round-amount flag alone insufficient; claimant provided contractor invoice matching $10,000 exactly
Synthetic identity confirmed - SSN issued 2019 for claimant claiming age 41
